name: Background Lines
description: Animated diagonal lines that flow across the background, creating a sleek geometric pattern with smooth motion.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections or page backgrounds where you want a clean, modern animated line pattern.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render on top of the animated lines

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

props.name: svgOptions
props.description: Options to customize the SVG lines (duration, colors, etc.)
